'''âr-w-t-s''' ('''karawtesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:electrolyse|electrolyse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-w-t-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:electrolyse|electrolyse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-w-t-s
|-
! Lemma
| karawtesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirawtesoko|thirawtesoko]] || [[word:jirawtesoko|jirawtesoko]] || [[word:shirawtesoko|shirawtesoko]] || [[word:kirawtesoko|kirawtesoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrawtesoko|thĂŠrawtesoko]] || [[word:jĂŠrawtesoko|jĂŠrawtesoko]] || [[word:shĂŠrawtesoko|shĂŠrawtesoko]] || [[word:kĂŠrawtesoko|kĂŠrawtesoko]]

|-

|}
